creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 156717
svn diff to fix audio/streamtranscoder

I depend on this periodically, and was informed that the
source went missing. I didn't want to loose this. So I
located a copy of the source, and will mirror it here.
I've also created a replacement for the WWW, which also
went missing.

CHANGES
Makefile - creates valid MASTER_SITES
pkg-descr - provide a valid WWW

That's it.

Thanks!

P.S. I notice it's now been over 5 weeks. Feel free to
add me as MAINTAINER.

--Chris
